scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but has two inaccuracies: (1) marks `description` as required when the gold standard says it is optional; (2) states 'Charmhub uses this [upstream-source] to identify which image to pull' when the gold standard explicitly says upstream-source is unofficial and not used by charmcraft or juju — it is only commonly included to help with testing.
scores.hallucination_notes: The claim that upstream-source is used by Charmhub to pull images is a factual inaccuracy (gold standard says it is not used by charmcraft or juju). `description` is incorrectly flagged as required. These are minor inaccuracies rather than fully invented APIs.
